notes:
A Loading screen quickly pops up and loads. Too fast to remember the name, but Unity and the game's name was definitly mentioned. No other popups/messages

I just installed Linux due to a microsoft problem that was difficult to repair, and ironically may have crippled the repair systems of Windows. I don't really have experiance with linux and am disipointed to see many games that I downloaded from steam can't get to the menu w/o crashing, despite decent records here.
The games I've downloaded and cannot get to menu include Return of Obra Dinn, Hardspace: Shipbreaker, Deep Rock Galactic, Outer Wilds, and Robocop; Rouge City. Psyconauts works until a second cutscene, when it then crashes.
With all these failures, I'm hoping there is something to get games working on my PC that I do not know about.
title: Hardspace: Shipbreaker
